name: Onyx
dialog: Hello! I’m Onyx. You must be my blind date?

responses.response: Yup, that’s me! {Player} is the name. Nice to meet you.
What? I’m not blind.
Yes, I'm {Player}. Nice to meet you.

name: Onyx
dialog: Haha, nice to meet you too, {Player}

name: Onyx
dialog: Hahaha, You're funny, what's your name?

responses.response: I wasn’t joking... I’m not blind.
I’m {Player}. Nice to meet you.

name: Onyx
dialog: Oh, uhm.. Don’t worry about it. I know you’re not blind.

name: Onyx
dialog: I was asking if you were waiting here for a date?

responses.response: Oh! Yes I am. Hi, I’m {Player}.
Why would you say it like that… But yes I am. And the name’s {Player}.

name: Onyx
dialog: You’re silly. It’s nice to meet you, {Player}

responses.response: It's nice to meet you too.

name: Onyx
dialog: It’s a common way of saying it… But let’s move on

name: Onyx
dialog: Nice to meet you too.

name: Onyx
dialog: So.. Have you ever been on a date before?

responses.response: Nope, this is my first date.
Yes, my friend has been setting me up on some dates lately. I’ve been trying to find the right person.
Yes. You’re one of many people I’m seeing.

name: Onyx
dialog: Oh! I hope I don’t disappoint...

responses.response: We’ll see.
Don’t worry. It’s not your fault if things don’t work out.

name: Onyx
dialog: Oh! I hope I don’t disappoint...

responses.response: We’ll see.
Don’t worry. It’s not your fault if things don’t work out.
We’ll see.
Don’t worry. It’s not your fault if things don’t work out.
We’ll see.
Don’t worry. It’s not your fault if things don’t work out.

name: Onyx
dialog: I see. That’s nice of him.

name: Onyx
dialog: Any luck so far?

responses.response: Not yet. I’m hoping you might be the one
Well there is someone… but I’m not quite sure yet.

name: Onyx
dialog: What do you mean by that?

responses.response: Just that I’ve been going on a lot of dates lately. I’m trying to find the right person.
Just like I said. I’m seeing multiple people at the same time. Do you have a problem with that?

name: Onyx
dialog: Oh okay, yea, love can be complicated at times.

name: Onyx
dialog: Well yea. I’m not into f*ckboys.

name: Onyx
dialog: I’m leaving. Change your attitude if you ever want to find true love.

name: Onyx
dialog: I am genderfluid by the way, is that a problem for you?

responses.response: Of course not! What pronouns should I use for you?
Well.. it's not really my preference.

name: Onyx
dialog: It changes based on whether I feel more masculine or feminine, right now I feel more masculine.

name: Onyx
dialog: So I'd prefer it if you use he/him pronouns right now.

name: Onyx
dialog: But when you don't know how I'm feeling at the moment or if it is too complicated for you, you can just use anything.

responses.response: Got it.
Okay then I'll just use everything.

name: Onyx
dialog: Oh okay.

name: Onyx
dialog: Anyway.. Is there anything you're curious about?
